_doc: Registry of deployed contracts on TPIX Chain (4289). Keep in sync after each deploy. Feeds scripts/verify-sources.js and external explorers/aggregators.

contracts.name: TPIXTokenFactoryV2
contracts.description: Coordinator contract for all ERC-20 token types (Enhanced, Utility, Reward, Governance, Stablecoin)

contracts.name: TPIXNFTFactory
contracts.description: Coordinator for NFT deployment — single NFT + collection

notes.howToAdd: After deploying a new contract, append { name, address, sourceFile, compilerVersion, optimizer, description, verified: false } and run `npm run verify:sources`. The script updates `verified: true` on success.
notes.aggregators: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, DeFiLlama, and CEX listings all check source verification status on the block explorer — keep this file up to date.
